rules.description: Linux Style: Ctrl+Alt Launchers (New Window Fix) & Win+E

manipulators.description: Ctrl + Alt + T -> Alacritty (Force New Window)
Ctrl + Alt + C -> VS Code (Force New Window)
Ctrl + Alt + P -> Firefox (New Private Window)

rules.description: Firefox: Ctrl+T new tab, Ctrl+1-9 switch tabs
Cmd+Tab => Cmd+Alt+0 (Reassigned command for opening Mission control)
End key to the end of the line (Control + e)
Home key to the beginning of the line (Control + a)
Mac OSX: disable cmd + h to prevent minimising an application window
Mac OSX: disable cmd + option + h + m to prevent minimising all windows
Alt + F4: Universal Window Close (Works in all apps)
Linux Style: Ctrl + Shift (alone) to Switch Language (Ctrl+Space)
